headline: FedEx sees global demand holding amid Iran war, raises profit outlook
summary:
STORY: FedEx said on Thursday that global demand is holding steady despite the war in Iran.

CEO Raj Subramaniam said that demand for the first two weeks of March has been in line with FedEx's expectations.

Executives said the Middle East accounts for a small part of the global delivery company.

According to analysts, about 8% of FedEx's international export volume flows through hubs in the war-affected region.

The company also reported strong fiscal earnings for the quarter ended February 28, helped by healthy delivery demand and cost controls during the pivotal holiday quarter.

Subramaniam said the peak season was "the most profitable" in FedEx history.

FedEx raised its full‑year profit forecast, sending shares up 9% in after‑hours trading.

With the war in Iran, oil prices hit over $100 a barrel.

But the shipping giant says the fuel surcharge it has in place is "doing its job." 

FedEx said its outlook assumes no additional geopolitical disruptions.

But adds that the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran could weigh on fourth-quarter performance if soaring fuel costs prompt customers to pull back.

headline: Super Micro co-founder's smuggling arrest, Planet Labs stock soars
summary: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman takes a look at some of Friday morning's trending tickers and stories. FedEx (FDX) earnings beat Wall Street's estimates on the top and bottom lines. The company also lifted its full-year guidance. The co-founder of Super Micro Computer (SMCI), Yih-Shyan "Wally" Liaw, was arrested for allegedly smuggling Nvidia (NVDA)-powered servers to China. Planet Labs (PL) stock is skyrocketing after the company beat fourth quarter revenue expectations.

content.title: Super Micro co-founder's smuggling arrest, Planet Labs stock soars
content.description:
Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman takes a look at some of Friday morning's trending tickers and stories.

FedEx (FDX) earnings beat Wall Street's estimates on the top and bottom lines. The company also lifted its full-year guidance.

The co-founder of Super Micro Computer (SMCI), Yih-Shyan "Wally" Liaw, was arrested for allegedly smuggling Nvidia (NVDA)-powered servers to China.

Planet Labs (PL) stock is skyrocketing after the company beat fourth quarter revenue expectations.

FedEx (FDX) earnings beat Wall Street's estimates on the top and bottom lines. The company also lifted its full-year guidance. Planet Labs (PL) stock is skyrocketing after the company beat fourth quarter revenue expectations.

headline: Auto & Transport Roundup: Market Talk
summary: 1412 GMT – FedEx’s F3Q results were well above TD Cowen’s forecasts, analysts from the firm say in a research note.  The outperformance was driven by increasing volumes and yield growth, both of which bucked industry trends as the shipping company wins more high-quality business, the analysts say.  “The volume and pricing strength that FDX posted in 3Q, despite multiple macro headwinds, speaks to the strength of the company’s new initiatives,” they write.

content.title: Auto & Transport Roundup: Market Talk
content.summary: 1412 GMT – FedEx’s F3Q results were well above TD Cowen’s forecasts, analysts from the firm say in a research note.  The outperformance was driven by increasing volumes and yield growth, both of which bucked industry trends as the shipping company wins more high-quality business, the analysts say.  “The volume and pricing strength that FDX posted in 3Q, despite multiple macro headwinds, speaks to the strength of the company’s new initiatives,” they write.
